name: Three Bean Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces kidney beans, canned (drained and rinsed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain cans of three bean salad, reserving liquid from 1 can; discard the remainder.
2. Combine beans, reserved liquid, rice, kidney beans, artichoke hearts, pepper, and salt in a large bowl.
3. Toss ingredients together and chill.
4. Serve over lettuce leaves.
Each serving provides:
322 calories
11.2 g. protein
8.9 g. fat
51.6 g. carbohydrate
6.8 g. dietary fiber
0 mg. cholesterol
640 mg. sodium.
Source: "Veg-able Rice"
